verses.1: Be merciful to me, God, for man wants to swallow me up.
verses.2: My enemies want to swallow me up all day long,
verses.4: In God, I praise his word.
verses.5: All day long they twist my words.
verses.9: Then my enemies shall turn back in the day that I call.
verses.10: In God, I will praise his word.
verses.11: I have put my trust in God.
verses.12: Your vows are on me, God.
verses.13: For you have delivered my soul from death,
